recommendations.title: The Swallows of Kabul
recommendations.overview: Summer 1998—Kabul under Taliban rule. Zunaira and Mohsen are young and in love. Despite the daily violence and misery, they hope for a better future. One day, a foolish gesture causes life to take an irrevocable turn.

recommendations.title: Presto
recommendations.overview: Dignity. Poise. Mystery. We expect nothing less from the great turn-of-the-century magician, Presto. But when Presto neglects to feed his rabbit one too many times, the magician finds he isn't the only one with a few tricks up his sleeve!

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.

recommendations.title: If Anything Happens I Love You
recommendations.overview: In this Oscar-winning short film, grieving parents journey through an emotional void as they mourn the loss of a child after a tragic school shooting.

recommendations.title: Alucarda
recommendations.overview: A young girl's arrival at a convent after the death of her parents marks the beginning of a series of events that unleash an evil presence on the girl and her mysterious new friend, an enigmatic figure known as Alucarda. Demonic possession, Satan wor

recommendations.title: Underworld: Endless War
recommendations.overview: Follows Selene across 3 separate periods in history as she hunts a group of Lycan brothers.

recommendations.title: Céline and Julie Go Boating
recommendations.overview: Julie, a daydreaming librarian, meets Céline, an enigmatic magician, and together they become the heroines of a time-warping adventure involving a haunted house, psychotropic candy, and a murder-mystery melodrama.

recommendations.title: Sailor Moon R: The Movie - The Promise of the Rose
recommendations.overview: While enjoying the flower gardens, Sailor Moon and friends encounter an old childhood friend of Mamoru's: an alien! He's come back to give Mamoru a special flower but doesn't like Usagi and the rest of the planet's inhabitants. Sailor Moon must defen

recommendations.title: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared
recommendations.overview: A disturbing puppet short exploring the concept of creativity.

recommendations.title: Orange
recommendations.overview: A girl mysteriously receives advice from her future self and as a result her group of friends, along with a newly arrived, troubled classmate, learn how to be better friends and a better community.
